title: Design a Feature Selection Page
description: A feature selection page with six clickable card-style labels, each containing a hidden checkbox. When a checkbox is checked, its background and border color change and a white checkmark appears via ::after. The cards use absolute positioning for the checkbox and a hover box-shadow effect.
objectives: Use appearance: none on checkboxes inside label cards
Position a checkbox absolutely within a relatively positioned label
Use :checked to change background and border color on selection
Use :checked::after to inject and display a centered checkmark
Apply :hover with box-shadow to label cards for interactivity

files.name: index.html
files.content: Feature Selection
